summary: Timed Challenge Mode & Difficulty Settings - All features tested and working. Complete frontend testing of new timed mode features including: toggle, 4 difficulty levels, timer display, warning/critical states, game lost screen, win screen time display, and stats tracking.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - proper React patterns, useEffect cleanup for timers, useCallback for memoization
DIFFICULTY_CONFIG properly defines all 4 levels with correct time limits and hint settings
Timer component properly handles warning (30s) and critical (10s) states with CSS classes
Game lost screen correctly shows 'Time's Up!' with steps taken, progress chain, and action buttons
Stats properly track gamesLost and bestTime for timed mode
data-testid attributes properly added for testing: game-timer, game-lost-screen, game-won-screen, timed-mode-toggle, difficulty-{level}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Timed Challenge Mode fully tested and working. All difficulty levels (Easy 5min, Medium 3min, Hard 90s, Expert 60s) function correctly. Timer warning states at 30s (yellow) and 10s (red pulsing) confirmed. Game Lost 'Time's Up!' screen appears on timeout. Win screen shows completion time. Stats track games played/won/lost/best time/win rate. Hint button visibility correctly tied to difficulty (hidden in Hard/Expert).

options_modal_timed_toggle.description: Timed Challenge toggle on/off works correctly

difficulty_selector.description: Appears when timed mode ON, hidden when OFF

show_hints_toggle_visibility.description: Hidden when timed mode ON, visible when OFF

timer_critical_state.description: Timer turns red with pulse at 10 seconds

hint_button_visibility.description: Hidden in Hard/Expert, visible in Easy/Medium

game_lost_screen.description: Shows 'Time's Up!' with steps taken, last artist, progress chain, Try Again and New Game buttons

win_screen_time_display.description: Shows completion time (e.g., '• 4s') in timed mode
